channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 11 com severidade Alta
• 5 novas CVEs
• 0 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

Sem notícias para seção de Infraestrutura.

────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 CVE-2026-43352 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: i3c: mipi-i3c-hci: Correct RING_CTRL_ABORT handling in DMA dequeue The logic used to abort the DMA ring contains several flaws: 1. The driver unconditionally issues a ring abort even when the ring has already stopped. The completion used to wait for abort completion is never re-initialized, resulting in incorrect wait behavior. The abort sequence uni...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43352
 
📰 NVIDIA confirms GeForce NOW data breach affecting Armenian users
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
NVIDIA has confirmed in a statement for BleepingComputer that GeForce NOW user information has been exposed in a data breach.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/nvidia-confirms-geforce-now-data-breach-affecting-armenian-users/
 
📰 JDownloader site hacked to replace installers with Python RAT malware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The website for the popular JDownloader download manager was compromised earlier this week to distribute malicious Windows and Linux installers, with the Windows payload found deploying a Python-based remote access trojan.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/jdownloader-site-hacked-to-replace-installers-with-python-rat-malware/
 
📰 Fake OpenAI repository on Hugging Face pushes infostealer malware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A malicious Hugging Face repository that reached the platform's trending list impersonated OpenAI's "Privacy Filter" project to deliver information-stealing malware to Windows users.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/fake-openai-repository-on-hugging-face-pushes-infostealer-malware/
 
📰 TCLBANKER Banking Trojan Targets Financial Platforms via WhatsApp and Outlook Worms
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Threat hunters have flagged a previously undocumented Brazilian banking trojan dubbed TCLBANKER that's capable of targeting 59 banking, fintech, and cryptocurrency platforms. The activity is being tracked by Elastic Security Labs under the moniker REF3076. The malware family is assessed to be a major update of the Maverick, which is known to leverage a worm called SORVEPOTEL to spread via
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/tclbanker-banking-trojan-targets.html
 
📰 Bannu Checkpoint Attack Kills at Least 15 Pakistani Security Personnel Near Afghan Border - The Media Line
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Check Point, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwwFBVV95cUxNN2VXSUk5WnFmMVRZVTh4YnFoLUlZYmstTGptdWc5MzlidklIRFV4V2wxQ3FkWWpCaEF4aHA0ZUFFRF9yRUlONHpaQ203anU2N3NPbXhBaDNHTTdjRjBSb2FpSGNGRjVBRDg5eWx5WG5TNmNNT2FmTjZDRkR2ZWVOcWJ1dmtoTTJNNWdMSF9rZG1fRzJTdU53SXBDcGEwbXZCSV9vTnRqcDlaVHdsZVVObmUyZG5uVUFmdjQ0bkZRaXptVXc?oc=5
 
📰 Deadly car bomb attack hits checkpoint in northwest Pakistan - Al Jazeera
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Check Point, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Dirty Frag: Using the Page Caches as an Attack Surface - Qualys
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Qualys, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiyAFBVV95cUxNanB0SEhwbGtXRTVuNG43VkRsVy1Gb0hkZ2swbXpsU1Q1VFUzbkRadzBxNDdqdDkyb2tkUjhOYTlxa0ZtYjV0SUtkV3BsSDRHN2ZkR19XblY0b0VaMjROaXQxa2VEZ3BwTmxPcnd3X0NOc0RzbEFPNmdiak9lYzhBT2xHNmtEaTV1S3RBd1NLVC1BVnJYM0hldURFQVpIZzlPZWhtNWF5NXUzYVhtYkNrUjRHX2psWkpLYUY0bEtKYU16WGVFRk9zSg?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2022-50945 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
WordPress 3dady real-time web stats plugin 1.0 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious JavaScript by exploiting unsanitized input fields. Attackers can insert JavaScript payloads in the dady_input_text or dady2_input_text fields via the plugin options panel to execute arbitrary code when the page is viewed.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-50945
 
🚨 CVE-2021-47927 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
WordPress Plugin WP Symposium Pro 2021.10 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts by exploiting insufficient sanitization of the forum name parameter. Attackers can submit POST requests to the admin setup page with JavaScript payloads in the wps_admin_forum_add_name parameter, which are stored and executed when the forum is accessed.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-47927
 
🚨 CVE-2026-42295 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Argo Workflows is an open source container-native workflow engine for orchestrating parallel jobs on Kubernetes. From version 4.0.0 to before version 4.0.5, the workflow executor logs all artifact repository credentials (S3 access keys, secret keys, GCS service account keys, Azure account keys, Git passwords, etc.) in plaintext on artifact operation. Any user with read access to workflow pod logs can extract these cr...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42295
 
🚨 CVE-2026-7652 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The LatePoint plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Account Takeover via Weak Password Recovery Mechanism in the unauthenticated guest booking flow in versions up to, and including, 5.5.0 This is due to the save_connected_wordpress_user() function propagating a LatePoint customer's email address to its linked WordPress user account via wp_update_user() without any ownership verification, combined with the guest booki...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7652
 
📰 Warning: Dirty Frag, a new Linux Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability, was disclosed. Patch Immediately! - Centre for Cybersecurity Belgium
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Warning: Dirty Frag, a new Linux Local Privilege Escalation vulnerability, was disclosed.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxONnZvSTdnNE5mdUt5NEtRRWtmV1FuMGstbmxsSkg1YTc2UGhfc0JlWjBmY3VSYjE4UEpqcllPZWNla1lvTGE3QVRCaFVQS2wwRG1JZ1FNdFJaa3FXTkFkbzNCeHlSUWlOM2FDdjBkclhEaHFKZFhUeFNtNUhxNTQ1d3BqZUpiMzdoMzJ4SzRqTXh2OUIxNk1HTGQ4OWR2dTY3empMNWFVd2FEamt1OXgtS0gyTzc2ZFBO?oc=5
 
📰 TCLBANKER Malware Leverages WhatsApp and Outlook Worm Features in Active Attacks - gbhackers.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.

📰 TCLBANKER Malware Targets Users Through Self-Propagating WhatsApp and Outlook Worm Modules - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.

────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 08/05/2026 até 10/05/2026.
